details.goal: Navigate to https://www.saucedemo.com/, verify the login page loads with the Swag Labs branding, enter username 'standard_user' and password 'secret_sauce' into the respective fields, click the Login button, and verify you are redirected to the inventory page that displays multiple products with the title 'Products' visible at the top. Also verify the shopping cart icon is visible in the top right corner

tool=type_text params=map[selector:#password value:secret_sauce] reason=Enter the password 'secret_sauce' into the password field (username already filled correctly).

tool=click params=map[selector:#login-button] reason=Click the Login button to submit credentials and navigate to the inventory page.
tool=finish params=map[status:success] reason=The inventory page is loaded with multiple products, 'Products' title visible, and shopping cart icon present, confirming successful login.

details.goal: On the SauceDemo inventory page, first verify that at least 6 products are displayed. Then use the sort dropdown to sort products by 'Price (low to high)'. Add the first product (lowest price) to the cart by clicking its 'Add to cart' button, then add the third product to the cart as well. Verify the shopping cart badge shows '2' indicating two items. Take a screenshot of the inventory page showing the added items

details.reason: tool=evaluate params=map[expression:document.querySelectorAll('.inventory_item').length] reason=Verify at least 6 products are displayed on the inventory page
tool=observe_ui params=map[] reason=To verify the current state of the page and ensure the correct elements are present before proceeding with the goal.

tool=evaluate params=map[expression:var sel = document.querySelector('select[data-test="product-sort-container"]'); sel.value = 'lohi'; sel.dispatchEvent(new Event('change', { bubbles: true }));] reason=Sort products by Price low to high to enable adding lowest-price items.

params.expression: var sel = document.querySelector('select[data-test="product-sort-container"]'); sel.value = 'lohi'; sel.dispatchEvent(new Event('change', { bubbles: true }));

tool=click params=map[selector:#add-to-cart-sauce-labs-onesie] reason=Add the first product (lowest price, Sauce Labs Onesie) to the cart as per the user goal.

details.goal: Click on the shopping cart icon to navigate to the cart page. Verify that exactly 2 items are in the cart with their correct names and prices matching what was added. Verify the total price is displayed. Remove one of the items from the cart by clicking its 'Remove' button. Verify only 1 item remains in the cart and the cart badge count updated. Click the 'Checkout' button to proceed to the checkout information page

details.goal: On the checkout information page, fill in the First Name field with 'John', the Last Name field with 'Doe', and the Postal Code field with '12345'. Click the 'Continue' button to proceed to the checkout overview page. On the overview page, verify the item name and price match the remaining product in the cart. Verify the tax amount is calculated and displayed. Verify the total price includes item price plus tax. Click the 'Finish' button to complete the order
